m_gamma_kg.source: GCM estimate, source_notes.md and derivation.md §1. Provisional; not derived from first principles.
m_gamma_kg.notes: L1's central claim. See L1/caveats.md for why the specific value is a free parameter.

c.source: Exact, SI 2019 definition. Speed-of-causality limit (see theory/speed-of-causality-principle.md). Photon speed v < c strictly.
c.notes: In GCM, c is the causality limit. Photons travel at v = c - 0_x (IVNA indexed infinitesimal), not at c exactly.

wang_bound_eV_per_c2.source: Wang et al. 2023, JCAP — fast radio burst (FRB) dispersion measure analysis.
wang_bound_eV_per_c2.notes: Cited in plan-coherence-case.md as the primary photon-mass bound for GCM comparison.

pdg_bound_eV_per_c2_approx.source: Particle Data Group 2022 combined bound (approximate, recalled from training). NEEDS VERIFICATION against current PDG review.
pdg_bound_eV_per_c2_approx.notes: HONESTY FLAG: this bound is from training-data memory, not a live source check. Listed for structural comparison; should be verified against PDG online.

ligo_graviton_bound_eV_per_c2.source: LIGO gravitational-wave dispersion constraint on the graviton mass.
ligo_graviton_bound_eV_per_c2.notes: Different particle (graviton, not photon). Included for context only — GCM's graviton mass (~10^-87 kg) is far below this.

E_visible_photon_eV.source: Order-of-magnitude reference for a visible-light photon.
E_visible_photon_eV.notes: Used to estimate (m_gamma c^2 / E)^2 ≈ 3e-37 for the speed-deviation check.
